rule_checks.detail: Global-first no-hardcoding rule exists in root CLAUDE.
Today logs migrated out of root CLAUDE.
Each folder doc contains Function description line.
Requires semantic review; cannot be safely auto-verified.
Requires domain-level overlap inspection; reported for manual review.
